body:
### Problem

Calling nvim_set_hl() with a url key causes Neovim to crash (segfault / abort) instead of returning an error.

### Steps to reproduce

nvim --clean -c "lua vim.api.nvim_set_hl(0, 'Test', {url='https://example.com', underline=true, fg=0x0000FF})"

### Expected behavior

Either:
- Accept url as a valid key (since hl_attr_define UI event already supports a url string attribute), or
- Return E5523: Invalid field: 'url' like other invalid keys

### Nvim version (nvim -v)

NVIM v0.11.6, Build type: Release, LuaJIT 2.1.1741730670

### Vim (not Nvim) behaves the same?

N/A

### Operating system/version

macOS 26.3

### Terminal name/version

Zonvie

### $TERM environment variable

xterm-256color

### Installation

downloaded binary

title: nvim_set_hl() crashes when url key is passed
